name: Scenario 1: Clean Auto-Approve
description: Office visit for acute URI — complete documentation, confidence 0.91, AUTO_APPROVE

payload.clinicalNotes: Patient presents with 3-day history of sore throat, runny nose, and low-grade fever (99.8F). No strep on rapid test. Diagnosis: acute upper respiratory infection (J06.9). Supportive care recommended. Office visit level 3 complexity justified by history and examination performed.

name: Scenario 2: Human Review Routing
description: Total knee arthroplasty under Medicare Advantage — ambiguous necessity, confidence 0.67, HUMAN_REVIEW

payload.clinicalNotes: Patient is a 68-year-old male with bilateral knee osteoarthritis, worse on the right. Reports knee pain limiting daily activities. Has completed some physical therapy in the past. X-ray shows moderate joint space narrowing. Requesting total knee arthroplasty on right knee. Conservative treatment history includes physical therapy (duration unclear) and occasional NSAIDs.

name: Scenario 3: Invalid Schema (Graceful Rejection)
description: Malformed message — missing required fields, returns HTTP 400, not retried

name: Scenario 4: Batch Publisher
description: Publishes 10 messages — mix of AUTO_APPROVE and HUMAN_REVIEW outcomes

payload.clinicalNotes: MRI brain with and without contrast for multiple sclerosis evaluation. Patient has documented relapsing-remitting MS with new neurological symptoms.

name: Scenario 5: Medicaid Auto-Approve
description: Medicaid surgical procedure with complete documentation, confidence 0.88, AUTO_APPROVE

payload.clinicalNotes: Upper GI endoscopy with biopsy for GERD with esophagitis and esophageal hemorrhage. Patient has failed PPI therapy (omeprazole 40mg daily x 8 weeks) with persistent symptoms. Prior endoscopy 2 years ago showed Grade B esophagitis. Requesting EGD with biopsy to assess current disease state.
